title: Record-Lifecycle Withdrawable Authority Ladder
description: EXT-35 fixture: `withdraw` affordance configured with both pre-determination kernel-mode AND post-determination intent. Exercises the authority-ladder MUST (ADR-0066 D-6.7 + WithdrawableAffordance allOf branch): `postDeterminationIntent` configured implies `requiresIssuerAcceptance: true`. amendmentTaxonomy declares `rescission` per the spec MUST 'withdrawable.enabled implies amendmentTaxonomy contains rescission'.
